summary: Master consolidated briefing for the Philip Harrison / Los Romeros Limited Lanzarote repatriation. Synthesises all 12+ conversation threads. Covers the confirmed banking breach (£265k in personal account), DLA→MVL rescue route, legal claim against Wincham/Adrem (£86k–£150k), Spanish tax deadlines (Modelo 210 by 20 Jul 2026), shareholding verification, DLA forensic audit (£25,069), ITP/Spanish tax clarification, Wincham victim database (782 companies, 1,564 individuals), SIC 70229 HMRC mis-classification intelligence, Ellis Harrison commercialisation strategy, Tide banking confirmation, and complete outstanding action register. Bank references use generic 'personal UK bank account' pending Phil's confirmation of actual bank name.
